title: Harden change creation

tasks.title: Build shared placeholder preflight engine and registry normalization seam
tasks.verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tool-registry.test.ts passed (31 tests). Prettier applied to modified files; post-format targeted tests passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended `ToolArgPreflightResult` with `normalizedArgs`, added `preflightToolArgs(...)`, and wired `tool-registry.ts` to pass normalized args into execute after successful preflight. Added pure structural field-policy executor with initial policies and regression coverage.
tasks.notes: Implemented shared preflight result with normalizedArgs and registry handoff. Added initial explicit placeholder policies for adv_change_create scope_repos empty-array omission and adv_run_test.command blank rejection. Added tests for normalized args, reject-only policy, and registry execute handoff. Verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tool-registry.test.ts passed (31 tests).

tasks.title: Apply adv_change_create placeholder policies and canonical minimal diagnostics
tasks.verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change-origin.test.ts src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tool-registry.test.ts passed (44 tests) after formatting.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended `adv_change_create` preflight with structural placeholder/cross-field checks for target/source/parent/scope fields and canonical minimal payload diagnostics while preserving strict origin matrix behavior.
tasks.notes: Implemented adv_change_create-specific placeholder policies and diagnostics in preflight. Added blank target_path rejection, source_project/source_change_id without target_path checks, parent_change_id sentinel rejection, scope_repos empty-array omission, and canonical_minimal_payload on create preflight errors. Verification: change-origin + preflight + tool-registry tests passed (44 tests).

tasks.title: Apply representative all-tools placeholder policies
tasks.verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tool-registry.test.ts passed (48 tests) after formatting.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended central tool-arg preflight policy table to reject blank placeholders across representative ADV tools and added record-value blank rejection for cancellation/supersession maps. Added parameterized regression coverage for broad tool families.
tasks.notes: Added representative placeholder policies across task, wisdom, test command, approvals, cancellation record values, gate metadata, worktree branch/base/reason, conformance audit fields, agenda fields, contract timestamps/recovery evidence, and Temporal approval evidence. Verification: preflight + registry tests passed (48 tests).

tasks.title: Update spec law for placeholder-safe ADV tool arguments
tasks.verification: Red: node spec check for rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01 failed before spec update. Green: JSON parse + required rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01 scenario IDs passed. adv_change_validate --strict passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added placeholder-safe ADV tool argument spec requirement and scenarios to .adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json, bumped spec version/date, and verified the new law is present and JSON-valid.
tasks.notes: Updated advance-workflow spec law with rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01 covering central placeholder preflight, explicit field policies, blank content/audit/linkage rejection, omission-equivalent normalization, and normalized execute payload. Verification: red missing-requirement check failed before edit; green JSON parse and requirement/scenario ID check passed; strict validation passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.

tasks.title: Build data-driven regression matrix for placeholder policies
tasks.verification: Red: placeholder regression matrix test failed with ReferenceError before matrix existed. Green: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts passed (26 tests). Incremental: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tool-registry.test.ts src/tools/change-origin.test.ts passed (61 tests) after formatting.
tasks.implementation_summary: Built `PLACEHOLDER_POLICY_REGRESSION_MATRIX` in preflight tests and executed it through `validateToolArgsBeforeExecute`, asserting ok/failure, field diagnostics, and normalized args across creation and representative tool families.
tasks.notes: Added data-driven placeholder policy regression matrix covering minimal valid ad hoc creation, invalid origin placeholders, blank artifacts, roadmap/triage/discovery origin constraints, target/source/lineage placeholders, empty scope_repos normalization, and representative all-tools traps. Verification: red ReferenceError before matrix existed; green matrix test passed; related preflight/registry/change-origin tests passed (61 tests).

tasks.title: Verify provider evidence, contract traceability, and final quality gates
tasks.verification: Release hardening remediation completed. Fixed validated harden findings in AGENTS.md, tool-arg-preflight comments, registry preflight integration tests, and non-record raw-args tests. Verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tool-registry.test.ts passed (58 tests); pnpm run check passed; targeted re-verification resolved all 6 prior findings; adv_change_validate --strict passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.
tasks.notes: Review surfaced additional in-scope placeholder-policy remediation: blank target_path/confirmationEvidence and blank source_project/source_change_id with target_path needed explicit preflight coverage. Reopened verification task to incorporate and checkpoint review fixes.

error_recovery.last_error: pnpm run check failed: @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars blockWithExpectedPath in src/tools/worktree-auto-manage.ts
error_recovery.next_strategy: Completed after focused lint and full check passed.

attempts.error: Unused helper blockWithExpectedPath caused lint failure.
attempts.diagnosis: Dead helper remained after earlier worktree auto-manage refactor; no references existed in local search.
attempts.fix_tried: Removed unused blockWithExpectedPath and now-unused AUTO_MANAGE_REMEDIATION constant.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal created with minimal 4-field payload. B/F/S scan: no CRITICAL findings, one LOW (S: "tells agents" slightly vague). Spec-law update flagged for discovery: advance-workflow needs a new requirement for canonical minimal ad hoc creation path and placeholder normalization policy.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed after user approved acceptance criteria via inline reply: `approve`. Agreement scope broadened to placeholder-sensitive handling across ADV tools. Contract minted from approved agreement with 43 items.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded and independently validated. Validator verdict: VALIDATED. No unresolved conflict, user-value tradeoff, or contract-compromise risk identified.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep plan approved by user via inline reply: `approve` (repeated). Task graph contains 6 tasks with TDD intent, dependencies, and contract refs. Strict validation passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning; spec-law task covers deltas during execution.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution reconfirmed after acceptance-review remediation. All 6 tasks are done and checkpointed through aa0606c. Verification: pnpm run check passed; focused regression/architecture tests passed (71 tests); adv_change_validate --strict passed with only NO_DELTAS warning.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work via inline reply: `accept`. Acceptance proof exists: executive summary persisted, contract review matrix has 43 rows passed/respected with 0 failing/unknown, full tests passed (227 files / 2995 tests), pnpm run check passed, strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning.

items.text: Given `{ summary: "Update Geist typography", capability: "ui-interaction-primitives", proposal: "...", problemStatement: "..." }`, when `adv_change_create` runs, then a change is created with no `origin`, no `fast_follow_of`, no `cross_project_origin`, no `scope_repos` unless product-linked default applies.

Given `{ summary: "...", proposal: "", design: "   ", origin_source_artifact: " " }`, when preflight runs, then no workflow starts, no blank artifact is written, and the response names every offending field and includes the canonical minimal payload when useful.

Given `{ summary: "...", origin_kind: "adhoc", origin_issue_number: 0, origin_source_artifact: "" }`, when preflight runs, then origin linkage fields are rejected or stripped by an explicit field policy, and no invalid `origin` is persisted.
Roadmap without `origin_issue_number` → rejected.
Triage with non-blank `origin_source_artifact` → accepted; without → accepted.
Discovery with `origin_issue_number` → rejected.
Existing origin tests continue to pass.
`target_path: ""` or whitespace-only → rejected or normalized by explicit policy; never attempts cross-project mutation.
`source_project` / `source_change_id` without `target_path` → rejected or normalized by explicit policy.
`parent_change_id: "none"` or blank → rejected or normalized by explicit policy.
`scope_repos: []` → normalized to omitted or rejected by explicit policy.
Required content fields such as `summary`, task `content`, wisdom `content`, test `command`, worktree `branch`, and audit `reason` fields reject blank/whitespace values before mutation or execution.
Optional durable/audit/path/linkage strings reject blank/whitespace when provided unless an explicit field policy treats omission as equivalent.
Record values such as task cancellation reasons and metadata reject blank values when they persist audit or workflow state.
Empty arrays/objects are normalized or rejected only through explicit policy.
Minimal valid ad hoc payload.
Ad hoc with blank/zero origin placeholders.
Blank artifact fields.
Roadmap/triage/discovery origin constraints.
Target/source/lineage placeholders.
Empty array `scope_repos` placeholder.

Representative all-tools traps: task content, gate notes/actor, approval evidence, cancellation reasons, wisdom content, run-test command, worktree branch/base, conformance audit fields, agenda title/reason.
`adv_change_create` description/schema includes a minimal valid ad hoc payload example and tells agents to omit optional fields not intended to be set.
Error diagnostics include field names and a compact retry shape when callers can recover mechanically.
Design records a provider-by-provider matrix covering GPT-class, Claude-class, and one open-weights/other model path if available.
Matrix columns include provider, placeholder pattern reproduced, root-cause classification, and follow-up obligation.
Placeholder/cross-field validation is centralized in shared preflight helpers where possible.
Execute paths keep only defensive assertions needed for safety, with tests proving preflight and execute behavior do not diverge.
Preserve strict correctness for `rq-backlogCoord08`.
Prefer structural correctness: schemas, preflight normalization/rejection, validators, and tests over prose-only guidance.
Keep valid ad hoc creation minimal and discoverable.
Treat provider/model differences as evidence.
Sentinel normalization policy is a design decision; heuristics must not own correctness, persistence, workflow state, or audit boundaries.
“Across all tools” means all ADV fields where placeholder values affect durable state, audit, workflow transitions, paths, external execution, or semantic filters.
Do not treat `origin_issue_number: 0` as valid.
Do not persist blank artifact files.
Do not silently retain invalid adhoc origin linkage.
Do not weaken cross-project mutation auditability.
Do not hide validation errors that indicate real ambiguity.
Do not rely on heuristic sentinel normalization as correctness authority.
Do not split `adv_change_create` into mode-specific tools in this change.
Do not redesign provider runtime hints unless design proves they are causal.
Do not normalize placeholders for approval evidence, recovery evidence, gate actor, command strings, paths, issue numbers, or IDs unless design proves omission-equivalence and audit safety.

rows.evidence: Regression matrix covers minimal valid ad hoc adv_change_create payload; focused tests passed (71) and full suite passed (2995).
Preflight rejects blank proposal/design/origin_source_artifact with field diagnostics; tool-arg-preflight tests passed.
Ad hoc origin placeholder/issue linkage regression rows reject invalid origin fields; change-origin and preflight tests passed.
Roadmap origin without issue number remains rejected by origin matrix tests; focused tests passed.
Triage with optional source artifact remains accepted in origin matrix coverage; focused tests passed.
Discovery with origin_issue_number remains rejected by existing origin regression coverage; focused tests passed.
Existing origin tests included in focused run; src/tools/change-origin.test.ts passed.
Blank target_path rejected for create and target-aware tools; regression rows added after review and passed.
source_project/source_change_id without target_path and blank source values with target_path are rejected by preflight matrix tests.
parent_change_id blank/sentinel values rejected by preflight matrix tests.
scope_repos empty array normalizes to omission in preflight matrix tests.
Required content/execution fields (summary, task content, wisdom content, test command, worktree branch) reject blank values in parameterized tests.
Optional durable/audit/path/linkage strings reject blanks through explicit FIELD_POLICIES; tests cover target_path, evidence, recovery, and linkage fields.
Record values for task cancellation reasons and supersededBy reject blanks in preflight tests.
Empty-array/object behavior is explicit in FIELD_POLICIES; scope_repos empty array is omitted, other placeholder handling rejects unless explicitly allowed.
Regression matrix includes minimal valid ad hoc payload case; tests passed.
Regression matrix includes ad hoc blank/zero origin placeholder cases; tests passed.
Regression matrix includes blank artifact field cases; tests passed.
Regression coverage includes roadmap/triage/discovery origin constraints via preflight and change-origin tests.
Regression matrix includes target/source/lineage placeholder cases, including review-added target-aware fields.
Regression matrix includes empty scope_repos normalization case; tests passed.
Representative all-tools traps covered for task, gate, approval, cancellation, wisdom, run-test, worktree, conformance, agenda, contract, Temporal, and status fields.
adv_change_create schema/description was updated with canonical minimal payload guidance and omission instruction.
Preflight error formatting includes field names and canonical_minimal_payload for create failures; tool-arg-preflight tests passed.
Design records GPT-class, Claude-class, and GLM/open-weights/other provider matrix.
Design matrix columns include provider path, placeholder pattern reproduced, classification, and design response/follow-up.
Placeholder/cross-field validation centralized in pure tool-arg-preflight helpers with registry handoff through normalizedArgs.
Registry normalized-args tests and execute parity coverage prove preflight and execute behavior align; focused and full tests passed.
rq-backlogCoord08 origin constraints preserved; change-origin tests passed.
Structural preflight policies, Zod schema validation, registry normalizedArgs, and regression tests own correctness; no prose-only enforcement.
Minimal ad hoc create path remains covered and discoverable through tests and diagnostics.
Provider differences recorded as evidence only; runtime behavior remains provider-agnostic structural validation.
Sentinel handling is explicit field policy; heuristics do not own persistence/workflow/audit decisions.
Policy coverage targets durable state, audit, workflow transition, path, external execution, and semantic-filter fields across ADV tools.
origin_issue_number: 0 remains invalid in origin/placeholder tests.
Blank artifact fields reject before mutation; tests verify no blank artifact persistence path.
Invalid ad hoc origin linkage rejected by preflight/origin tests.
Cross-project target_path and confirmationEvidence blanks reject structurally; auditability preserved.
Review found deterministic field diagnostics; no real validation errors hidden by broad normalization.
Sentinel normalization limited to explicit omission-equivalent policy; audit/path/linkage defaults reject.
adv_change_create API not split; change stayed within tool-boundary hardening scope.
Provider runtime hints were not redesigned; provider matrix only informed validation design.
Approval evidence, recovery evidence, gate actor, command strings, paths, issue numbers, and IDs reject placeholders unless explicitly omission-equivalent; tests cover representative fields.
